dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Hello! What time did you wake up?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Hi everyone! Time to wrap up.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Did you pay the electricity bill?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Did you hear about the new shop?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: What time did you wake up today?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Did you watch the match yesterday?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: What time will you come back?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Did you hear any noise last night?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: What time is the shop closing?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Where did you keep the keys?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: What time will the guests arrive?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Did you check the gas cylinder?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Did you talk to him today?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Did you hear the alarm today?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Are you going to the office today?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Did you lock the back door?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: What are you planning to cook?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Are you going out in the rain?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: What time will you reach home?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Are the kids back from school?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Did you water the garden today?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Did you set the alarm for tomorrow?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: What time is the water supply today?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Are you going to the post office?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Did you park the vehicle properly?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: What are you doing tomorrow morning?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Did you check the lock once more?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Did you put the clothes to dry?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Did you prepare everything for tomorrow?

dialogues.speaker: Person 3
dialogues.text: Even the fan is not enough.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Weather was nice in the morning.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Looks like rain in the evening.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Good morning, I need some information about opening a current account.

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: Good morning, I can help you with that.

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: You need ID proof, address proof, and business details.

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: Yes, it depends on the type of account.

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: Sure, I will give you the details.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: I want to transfer money to another account.

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: You can do it using NEFT or IMPS.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: When will the money be transferred?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: I lost my debit card yesterday.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Can you help me block it?

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: Yes, I will block it now.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Will I get a new card?

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: Yes, you can apply for a replacement.

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: It will take about a week.

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: Yes, a small fee will be charged.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: I want to apply for a loan.

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: What type of loan are you looking for?

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: Let me know if you need help.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: I need a bank statement for last month.

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: Sure, I will print it for you.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Do I need to pay any charges?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: I want to update my mobile number in my account.

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: Sure, please fill out this update form.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Do I need to submit any documents?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: How long will it take to update?

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: It will be updated within 24 hours.

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: Yes, you will get an SMS.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: I want to close my account.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: I am moving to another city.

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: Okay, please fill this closure form.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Do I need to clear all dues?

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: Yes, your balance should be zero.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: I will withdraw the remaining amount.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: When will the account be closed?

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: It will be closed within two days.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: I need to apply for a cheque book.

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: The first cheque book is free.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: I want to know about fixed deposits.

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: Sure, we offer different FD schemes.

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: Would you like to open one?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: I have an issue with my transaction.

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: What seems to be the problem?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Money was debited but not received.

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: It will be resolved within 24 hours.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Will I get my money back?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: I want to change my account type.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Do I need to submit documents?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Who should I write as payee?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: I want to activate internet banking.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Do I need to create a username?

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: I want to check my loan status.

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: It may take a few more days.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: Can I speed up the process?

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: Please ensure all documents are submitted.

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: Then it will be processed soon.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: I want to update my address.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: I want to link my Aadhaar to my account.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: I want to open a joint account.

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: ID and address proof for both.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: I need help with net banking login.

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: Yes, go to the login page.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: I want to know my credit card limit.

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: You can request an increase later.

dialogues.speaker: Person 1
dialogues.text: I want to know about locker facility.

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: We provide lockers of different sizes.

dialogues.speaker: Person 2
dialogues.text: Yes, currently there is a waiting list.
